• Pixel‑perfect UI with mobile controls, rounded “bevel” panels, and dynamic HUD gauges.
  • Procedural mining world, tiered drills, AOE mining, explosives, and a teleporter network.
  • Multiplayer sync via MQTT, admin host election, cloud save system, and in‑game shop.
    Game.init();
    Shop.buy('drill');

This code creates a mining game where players move on a procedurally generated map, mine resources with tier‑based drills, and interact via a synchronized multiplayer layer. The UI includes mobile‑friendly controls, configurable gauges, and a shop for upgrades and consumables, while the networking layer manages host election, state sync, and cloud saves.
